_comment: Burnt burn_mappings format — copy this file into your own datapack under
Each entry maps a source block to its Burnt destination block.
The destination can be any Burnt block: smoldering logs, sooty logs,
Block state properties (axis, waterlogged, facing, etc.) are copied
automatically from the source block where the destination supports them.
Tip: for large mods with many wood types, the tag approach is less
verbose — add blocks to burnt:burns_to_smoldering_log or
burnt:burns_to_smoldering_log_slow in your own datapack instead.
